ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "catalog_page" TEXT /* Page number in the catalog */,
  "base_price" TEXT /* Base price of the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Inventory status of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  " dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing rule */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the pricing rule applies to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity threshold for the discount */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price for the given quantity */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage for the given quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_location FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_location") REFERENCES warehouse ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_cart" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the image is associated with */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g. thumbnail, main image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
